untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 12-month lookback period classification (L/C/H) which requires historical extrema analysis not available as single indicator, (2) gap vs non-gap breakout differentiation requiring intraday/previous-close comparison logic, (3) pullback percentage analysis (61%/48% occurrence rates) requiring multi-bar pattern recognition, (4) specific direction-dependent average returns (H31%, H21%, L19%, C18%, L21%, C18%, H20%, H18%) mapped to lookback regime, (5) precise timing of pullback end (9-10 days) as exit trigger. These require custom pattern detection functions beyond allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to detect breakouts and pivot points for pullback reversal. However, this loses critical semantics: the 12-month reference point classification, gap analysis, and lookback-regime-specific return profiles cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. The signal fundamentally requires pattern state machine logic (track entry type, gap presence, 12-month reference, days since entry) unavailable in the indicator-based rule engine.
